name: Pork Chop & Apple Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Sear the pork chops on both sides and remove them from the pan.
2. Add butter to the drippings and sauté onion until clear.
3. Drain the onions and mix with apples, sugar, ginger, breadcrumbs, salt, and 1/4 cup water (or wine).
4. Spread this mixture in the bottom of a shallow buttered casserole dish.
5. Arrange pork chops on top of the mixture.
6. Bake, covered, at 350°F for 1 hour.
7. Remove the lid during the last 10 minutes to brown.
Serves well with cottage cheese salad.
